name: Tera (Castlevania Nocturne)
description: Later, upon seeing how broken Maria had become and was so willing to be turned into a vampire as well, Tera finally realized the negative influence she was having on her daughter, causing her to leave her to "find herself", showing that Tera has acknowledged the dark changes she was going through and realized that she would no longer positively influence her daughter if she had stayed with her. She decided to move into England.
creator: Dave Aldrich
